headline: A Look At Camden Property Trust’s Valuation As Analysts See Modest Undervaluation Despite Mixed Returns
summary: Without a clear single news headline, Camden Property Trust (CPT) has recently drawn attention after a one-month return of 9.3%, contrasted with a small negative return over the past three months. See our latest analysis for Camden Property Trust. At a share price of US$105.93, Camden Property Trust has recently seen a 4.26% 1 day and 9.25% 30 day share price return, while its 1 year total shareholder return of 2.42% decline contrasts with an 8.84% gain over three years.
